detailFaq.q: How long does website development take?
detailFaq.a: Company profile: 2–4 weeks. Complex web app: 2–4 months. A timeline estimate is provided at the start of the project.
Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase/PostgreSQL.
Yes, up to 3 design revisions are included at no extra cost.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.desc: Intuitive iOS and Android mobile apps with high performance, seamless user experience, and features tailored to your business needs.

process.title: Consultation & Scope
process.desc: Defining the features, user flow, and target audience of the app.

process.title: Design & Prototyping
process.desc: An interactive prototype you can try before development begins.

process.title: Development Sprints

process.title: QA & Submission

detailFaq.a: We recommend Flutter for best performance, React Native for React ecosystem integration.

detailFaq.q: How long does the App Store review take?
detailFaq.a: Apple App Store: 1–3 business days. Google Play: a few hours to 2 days.
Yes, we offer maintenance packages and periodic feature updates.

detailFaq.a: We carry business management, accounting, HR & payroll software, and more. Contact us for the full catalog.
Yes, all software we sell comes with official licenses from the original vendor.

detailFaq.q: Is technical support included after purchase?
detailFaq.a: Yes, we provide technical support for installation and usage after purchase.

items.title: AI Integration
items.desc: Integrate artificial intelligence into your products or business processes for maximum efficiency, smart automation, and competitive advantage.

process.title: Business Process Analysis
process.desc: Identifying the processes most suited for automation or enhancement with AI.

process.title: AI Solution Design
process.desc: Designing the architecture and selecting the most appropriate AI models for your needs.

process.title: Development & Integration
process.desc: Building and integrating the AI solution into your existing systems or applications.

process.title: Testing & Deployment
process.desc: Thorough testing, fine-tuning, and deployment to the production environment.

detailFaq.q: What AI solutions can be integrated?
detailFaq.a: Chatbots, predictive analytics, document automation, computer vision, and large language model (LLM) integrations.

detailFaq.q: How long does AI integration take?
detailFaq.a: Depending on complexity, from 2 weeks for a simple chatbot to several months for enterprise solutions.
Not always. We tailor the solution to your existing infrastructure or recommend the most efficient setup.

cta.subtitle: Let's discuss how Teridox can support your business technology needs. First consultation is free!

about.label: About Us
about.title: A Technology Company Focused on Real Solutions
about.p1: Teridox was born from a deep passion for technology and the belief that every business deserves the best software solutions. We build more than products — we build the technology foundation that drives real growth.
about.p2: With a dedicated team and strong commitment since 2024, we stand as your trusted technology partner ready to help your business grow.
about.subtitle: We are an experienced team of developers dedicated to delivering the best technology solutions for your business

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Teridox was founded in 2024 with a drive to help Indonesian businesses access affordable and reliable technology solutions. We believe good technology must be accessible, scalable, and truly solve real business problems. Starting from scratch, we have grown steadily and now serve clients from various industries with web development, mobile apps, and software sales services.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: To help Indonesian businesses grow by providing high-quality, affordable, and precisely targeted web development, mobile apps, and software services.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: To become the leading technology company in Indonesia, known for quality, reliability, and positive impact on every client we serve.

items.title: Integrity
items.desc: We are transparent, honest, and committed on every project.

items.title: Innovation
items.desc: Always adopting the latest technology to deliver the best solutions.

items.title: Collaboration
items.desc: We work as partners, not just vendors.

items.title: Quality
items.desc: High standards in every line of code and every product we sell.

items.title: Teridox Founded
items.desc: Established with a vision to provide affordable web development, mobile apps, and software services for Indonesian businesses.

items.title: First Projects
items.desc: Completed our first web and mobile projects, building client trust from the ground up.

items.title: Software Services
items.desc: Expanded our offering by adding licensed software sales to meet growing client needs.

items.title: Growing Client Base
items.desc: Started serving clients from various industries across Indonesia on a consistent basis.

items.title: Continuing to Grow
items.desc: Continuously innovating and improving our services to deliver the best solutions for every client.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services and working process

items.q: How long does website development take?
items.a: Development time varies by complexity. A company profile website: 2–4 weeks. A web app with complex features: 2–4 months. We always provide a timeline estimate at the start of the project.

items.q: How much does mobile app development cost?
items.a: Cost depends on the platform (iOS/Android/both), features, and complexity. Starting from IDR 30 million for simple apps up to hundreds of millions for enterprise apps. Contact us for a free estimate.

items.q: What software products are available for purchase?
items.a: We offer a range of officially licensed software, including business management, accounting & finance, HR & payroll, and more. Contact us to view our full catalog and get a recommendation suited to your needs.

items.q: Does Teridox provide maintenance after the project is done?
items.a: Yes! We provide monthly maintenance packages that include security updates, bug fixes, server monitoring, and technical support. Packages start from IDR 1.5 million/month.
We use modern technologies: Next.js, React, TypeScript for frontend; Node.js, Python for backend; Flutter & React Native for mobile; AWS, Vercel, Supabase for cloud infrastructure.
Our process: (1) Consultation & discovery, (2) Proposal & contract, (3) Design & prototyping, (4) Agile sprint development, (5) Testing & QA, (6) Deployment, (7) Handover & training.

items.q: Can I request changes during the development process?
items.a: Absolutely! We use agile methodology with 2-week sprints, so feedback and changes can be integrated flexibly. Major changes outside the original scope may require an addendum.

items.q: Does Teridox serve clients outside Bali?
items.a: Yes! We serve clients from across Indonesia. Our workflow is fully remote-friendly with collaboration tools like Figma, Notion, and Slack.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Teridox is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you use our services.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and project details when you contact us or use our services. We also collect technical data such as IP addresses, browser type, and pages visited to improve your experience.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: The information we collect is used to: provide and improve our services, respond to your inquiries and requests, send information related to your project or the services you use, and fulfill applicable legal obligations.

sections.title: Sharing of Information
sections.content: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties without your consent, except as required by law or with partners who assist in our service operations under strict confidentiality agreements.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We implement reasonable technical and organizational security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. However, no method of data transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: Our website uses cookies to enhance your experience. You can configure your browser to refuse cookies, though some website features may not function optimally as a result.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, update, or delete the personal information we hold about you. To exercise these rights, please contact us at hello@teridox.com.

sections.title: Policy Changes
sections.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated via email or a notice on our website. Continued use of our services after changes means you accept the updated policy.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please reach us at hello@teridox.com or through our contact page.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By using Teridox services, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before using our services.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using Teridox services, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these terms and conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

sections.title: Services Provided
sections.content: Teridox provides web development, mobile app development, licensed software sales, and AI integration services. Service details, scope, and pricing will be agreed upon in a written contract or proposal before work begins.

sections.title: Client Obligations
sections.content: Clients are responsible for providing required information, materials, and access in a timely manner, delivering feedback within agreed timeframes, and ensuring that content provided does not infringe third-party rights or applicable laws.

sections.title: Payment
sections.content: Payment is made according to the schedule agreed upon in the contract. Late payments may result in work delays. Teridox reserves the right to suspend services if payment is not made within the stipulated timeframe.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: Upon receipt of full payment, intellectual property rights over custom-built deliverables will be transferred to the client. Teridox retains rights to tools, frameworks, and third-party components used in development.

sections.title: Confidentiality
sections.content: Both parties agree to keep confidential any sensitive information shared during the engagement. This obligation applies throughout the contract period and for two years after its termination.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Teridox's liability is limited to the agreed contract value. We are not liable for indirect losses, loss of profit, or damages arising from the use or inability to use our services.

sections.title: Dispute Resolution
sections.content: Any disputes arising from the use of our services will first be resolved through mutual discussion. If no agreement is reached, disputes will be settled through the applicable legal channels in Indonesia.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.content: For questions regarding these terms and conditions, please contact us at hello@teridox.com or through our contact page.
